objective: Map Microsoft Teams workflows for safe messaging and navigation, restricted to self-chat only.
constraints: COMMUNICATION SAFETY: Only use self-chat. Do not message any other user, group chat, channel, or external contact.
All outbound test messages must start with prefix: [CASCADE-TEST].
Do not start calls/meetings, do not share screen, do not join external meetings
Do not post in channels; do not @mention anyone
Prefer stable UI selectors (left nav rail, chat list, message composer, send button)

navigation: locate self-chat (or start self-chat if available)
messaging_self_only: send a plain text message to self ([CASCADE-TEST])
attachments_self_only: attach a small test file to self-chat (optional if available)
verify attachment preview and send (self only)
